name: FinRAG-12B: A Production-Validated Recipe for Grounded Question Answering in Banking
summary: arXiv:2605.05482v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are rapidly being adopted across various domains. However, their adoption in banking industry faces resistance due t...
description: arXiv:2605.05482v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are rapidly being adopted across various domains. However, their adoption in banking industry faces resistance due to demands for high accuracy, regulatory compliance, and the need for verifiable and grounded responses. We present a unified, data-efficient framework for training grounded domain-specific LLMs that o...
author: Denys Katerenchuk, Pablo Duboue, Keelan Evanini, David Gondek, Nithin Govindugari, Olivier Allauzen, Joshua Baptiste, David J More, Joshua Schechter
